name: legitimacy-block
author: Robin Westerlund
purpose: Append epistemic structure (claims-status, disputes, gaps, self-grade) to any analytical output
outputs: Claims table (id, statement, status, confidence, sources, critical?)
Grade YAML block (coverage, confidence, verdict, loop_backs_used)
when_to_use: Composed AFTER another skill that produced substantive claims. For analytical/research/decision-grade output that will be quoted downstream.
when_not_to_use: Conversational replies, single-fact answers, creative writing, outputs with <=3 substantive claims.
